Appearance

Cognipeer GatewayMulti-Tenant AI Gateway

Production-ready gateway for LLM inference, vector stores, agent tracing, RAG, guardrails, and more — with complete tenant isolation.

Get Started
View on GitHub

🏢 Multi-Tenant

Complete data isolation per company with separate databases and license-based feature control.

🤖 LLM Gateway

OpenAI-compatible chat completions and embeddings API with provider abstraction and automatic retries.

🔍 Vector Stores

Manage vector indexes across providers (Pinecone, Qdrant, Weaviate, S3 Vectors) with a unified API.

📊 Agent Tracing

Ingest and visualize agent execution traces with batch and streaming modes, async persistence.

🛡️ Guardrails

Input/output validation with regex, keyword, and LLM-based evaluators to enforce content policies.

📚 RAG Modules

End-to-end retrieval-augmented generation with document ingestion, chunking, and query pipelines.

💾 Caching & Resilience

Built-in cache layer (memory/Redis), retry with exponential back-off, and circuit breaker protection.

📈 Observability

Structured logging with request correlation, health checks, usage tracking, and alert system.

Quick Start ​

bash
npm install
cp .env.example .env.local
npm run dev
bash
docker build -t cgate .
docker run -p 3000:3000 --env-file .env.local cgate

Architecture Overview ​

Cognipeer Gateway is built on Next.js 15 with the App Router, TypeScript, and MongoDB. It serves as the central gateway for all AI operations:

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                   Clients                        │
│          (SDKs, Agents, Applications)            │
└────────────────┬────────────────────────────────┘
                 │ REST API
┌────────────────▼────────────────────────────────┐
│              Cognipeer Gateway                   │
│  ┌──────────┐ ┌──────────┐ ┌──────────────────┐ │
│  │ Middleware│ │  CORS    │ │ Request Context  │ │
│  │ (Auth)   │ │          │ │ (AsyncLocalStore)│ │
│  └──────────┘ └──────────┘ └──────────────────┘ │
│  ┌──────────┐ ┌──────────┐ ┌──────────────────┐ │
│  │ Inference│ │  Vector  │ │  Agent Tracing   │ │
│  │ Service  │ │  Service │ │  Service         │ │
│  └──────────┘ └──────────┘ └──────────────────┘ │
│  ┌──────────┐ ┌──────────┐ ┌──────────────────┐ │
│  │   RAG    │ │Guardrails│ │  File Storage    │ │
│  │ Service  │ │ Service  │ │  Service         │ │
│  └──────────┘ └──────────┘ └──────────────────┘ │
│  ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  │  Core: Config │ Logger │ Cache │ Resilience  │
│  │  Runtime Pool │ Health │ Lifecycle │ Async   │
│  └──────────────────────────────────────────────┤
└────────────────┬────────────────────────────────┘
                 │
┌────────────────▼────────────────────────────────┐
│          LLM / Vector / Storage Providers        │
│   OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, AWS Bedrock, etc.   │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

Key Capabilities ​

  • OpenAI-compatible API — Drop-in replacement for /v1/chat/completions and /v1/embeddings
  • Provider abstraction — Swap between OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Vertex, AWS Bedrock, and custom models
  • Multi-tenant isolation — Each company gets a separate database and license tier
  • Production infrastructure — Retry, circuit breaker, caching, structured logging, health checks
  • Async-first design — Usage logging and tracing persist asynchronously without blocking responses
  • Kubernetes-ready — Dockerfile, Helm charts, and graceful shutdown support included
